testcase.name: test_multichip_profile_internal_stacked_prefill[blackhole-mesh_device0-device_params0]

failure.message: ValueError: contiguous caches must have local shape (1, 2, 128, 128), got (32, 2, 128, 128)

testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices)
@pytest.mark.parametrize("device_params", STACK_DEVICE_PARAMS, indirect=True) @pytest.mark.parametrize("mesh_device", MESH_PARAMS, indirect=True) def test_multichip_profile_internal_stacked_prefill(mesh_device): """Profile only the stack-preserving two-layer prefill region."""
if os.environ.get(PROFILE_STACKED_PREFILL_ENV) != "1": pytest.skip(f"Set {PROFILE_STACKED_PREFILL_ENV}=1 to profile stacked prefill") iterations = int(os.environ.get(PERF_ITERS_ENV, "1")) active_batch = int(os.environ.get(ACTIVE_BATCH_ENV, EMITTED_BATCH)) config = _config() decoder = MultichipDecoder.from_state_dict( _real_state(), hf_config=config, layer_idx=LAYER_IDX, mesh_device=mesh_device, batch=active_batch ) first_caches = _multichip_caches(config, mesh_device) second_caches = _multichip_caches(config, mesh_device) generator = torch.Generator().manual_seed(2519) hidden = torch.randn( (1, active_batch, EMITTED_PREFILL_SEQUENCE, config.hidden_size), generator=generator, dtype=torch.bfloat16, ) stacked_input, logical_seq_len = decoder.prepare_prefill_residual(_mesh_input(hidden, mesh_device))
def stacked_pair(): output = decoder.prefill_forward_stacked(stacked_input, *first_caches, logical_seq_len=logical_seq_len) return decoder.prefill_forward_stacked(output, *second_caches, logical_seq_len=logical_seq_len)
> stacked_pair()
models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1073: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:1070: in stacked_pair output = decoder.prefill_forward_stacked(stacked_input, *first_caches, logical_seq_len=logical_seq_len) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1165: in prefill_forward_stacked return self.prefill_forward( models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1016: in prefill_forward self._validate_caches(key_cache, value_cache, paged=page_table is not None) _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <models.autoports.mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501.tt.multichip_decoder.MultichipDecoder object at 0x78d59828f590> key_cache = device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000], [ 0.000...0, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000]]]], shape=Shape([32, 2, 128, 128]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE) value_cache = device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 0.0000, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000], [ 0.000...0, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, 0.0000]]]], shape=Shape([32, 2, 128, 128]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT8_B, layout=Layout::TILE)
def _validate_caches(self, key_cache, value_cache, *, paged: bool = False) -> None: key_shape = tuple(key_cache.shape) value_shape = tuple(value_cache.shape) if key_shape != value_shape: raise ValueError(f"key/value cache shapes differ: {key_shape} and {value_shape}") if paged: if len(key_shape) != 4 or key_shape[1] != self.num_kv_heads or key_shape[3] != self.head_dim: raise ValueError( "paged caches must have local shape " f"[num_blocks, {self.num_kv_heads}, block_size, {self.head_dim}], got {key_shape}" ) if key_shape[0] < 1 or key_shape[2] < 1: raise ValueError(f"paged cache num_blocks and block_size must be positive, got {key_shape}") return expected = (self.batch, self.num_kv_heads, self.max_cache_len, self.head_dim) if key_shape != expected: > raise ValueError(f"contiguous caches must have local shape {expected}, got {key_shape}") E ValueError: contiguous caches must have local shape (1, 2, 128, 128), got (32, 2, 128, 128)
models/autoports/mistralai_mistral_small_24b_instruct_2501/tt/multichip_decoder.py:770: ValueError
